name: Prepara lotes de leitura
Acumula leituras no contexto
Máquina de Estados (dados reais CLP)
Prepara dados Dashboard
func:
var plc = msg.payload || {};
var msgs = [
    {payload: (plc.iTIT_01_Refratario_PV||0).toFixed(1)*1, topic:'tit01'},
    {payload: (plc.iTIT_02_Ignicao_PV||0).toFixed(1)*1,    topic:'tit02'},
    {payload: (plc.iTIT_03_Cx_Vento_PV||0).toFixed(1)*1,   topic:'tit03'},
    {payload: (plc.iFIT_01_GLP_PV||0).toFixed(2)*1,         topic:'fit01'},
    {payload: (plc.iFIT_02_Ar_PV||0).toFixed(2)*1,          topic:'fit02'},
    {payload: (plc.iPIT_01_GLP_PV||0).toFixed(3)*1,         topic:'pit01'},
    {payload: (plc.iPIT_02_Gases_PV||0).toFixed(3)*1,       topic:'pit02'},
    {payload: plc.EMERGENCIA_ALARME1 ? '🚨 EMERGÊNCIA ATIVA' : '✅ SISTEMA OK',
              style: plc.EMERGENCIA_ALARME1 ? 'color:red;font-weight:bold' : 'color:green;font-weight:bold',
              topic:'alarme'},
    {payload: plc.iZS_Queimador_Piloto   ? '🔥 CHAMA PILOTO ON'    : '⭕ PILOTO APAGADO',   topic:'chama_p'},
    {payload: plc.iZS_Queimador_Principal? '🔥 CHAMA PRINCIPAL ON' : '⭕ PRINCIPAL APAGADO',topic:'chama_pr'},
    {payload: plc.iSV_01_Opened ? '🟢 SV-01 ABERTA' : '🔴 SV-01 FECHADA', topic:'sv01'},
    {payload: plc.iSV_02_Opened ? '🟢 SV-02 ABERTA' : '🔴 SV-02 FECHADA', topic:'sv02'},
    {payload: plc.iSV_GLP_Opened? '🟢 GLP ABERTO'   : '🔴 GLP FECHADO',   topic:'svglp'},
    {payload: plc.iCx_Vento_Opened?'🟢 CX.VENTO ABERTA':'🔴 CX.VENTO FECHADA',topic:'cxvento'},
    {payload: plc.oAciona_Soprador? '⚡ SOPRADOR ON' : '○ SOPRADOR OFF', topic:'soprador'},
    {payload: plc.oAciona_Ignicao ? '⚡ IGNITOR ON'  : '○ IGNITOR OFF',  topic:'ignitor'},
];
return [msgs];

name: Prepara dados Dashboard (Seq)
func:
var d = msg.payload || {};
var plc = d.plc || {};
var state = d.state || {};
var msgs = [
    {payload: state.estado || 'IDLE', topic:'estado'},
    {payload: (state.log||[]).join('\n'), topic:'log'},
    {payload: (plc.iTIT_01_Refratario_PV||0).toFixed(1)*1, topic:'tit01'},
    {payload: (plc.iTIT_02_Ignicao_PV||0).toFixed(1)*1,    topic:'tit02'},
    {payload: (plc.iTIT_03_Cx_Vento_PV||0).toFixed(1)*1,   topic:'tit03'},
    {payload: (plc.iFIT_01_GLP_PV||0).toFixed(2)*1,         topic:'fit01'},
    {payload: (plc.iFIT_02_Ar_PV||0).toFixed(2)*1,          topic:'fit02'},
    {payload: (plc.iPIT_01_GLP_PV||0).toFixed(3)*1,         topic:'pit01'},
    {payload: (plc.iPIT_02_Gases_PV||0).toFixed(3)*1,       topic:'pit02'},
    {payload: plc.EMERGENCIA_ALARME1 ? '🚨 EMERGÊNCIA ATIVA' : '✅ SISTEMA OK', topic:'alarme'},
    {payload: plc.iZS_Queimador_Piloto   ?'🔥 CHAMA PILOTO ON':'⭕ PILOTO APAGADO',  topic:'chama_p'},
    {payload: plc.iZS_Queimador_Principal?'🔥 CHAMA PRINCIPAL ON':'⭕ PRINCIPAL APAGADO',topic:'chama_pr'},
    {payload: plc.iSV_01_Opened?'🟢 SV-01 ABERTA':'🔴 SV-01 FECHADA', topic:'sv01'},
    {payload: plc.iSV_02_Opened?'🟢 SV-02 ABERTA':'🔴 SV-02 FECHADA', topic:'sv02'},
    {payload: plc.iSV_GLP_Opened?'🟢 GLP ABERTO':'🔴 GLP FECHADO',    topic:'svglp'},
    {payload: plc.iCx_Vento_Opened?'🟢 CX.VENTO ABERTA':'🔴 CX.VENTO FECHADA',topic:'cxvento'},
    {payload: plc.oAciona_Soprador?'⚡ SOPRADOR ON':'○ SOPRADOR OFF',  topic:'soprador'},
    {payload: plc.oAciona_Ignicao?'⚡ IGNITOR ON':'○ IGNITOR OFF',    topic:'ignitor'},
    {payload: (plc.Parcial_TempoSinterizacao||0)*1, topic:'tempo_sint'},
];
return [msgs];

name: Handler Comandos HMI → CLP
Status Conexão CLP
